mapper.insert: insert into conversation(user_id, session_id, role, content, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, now())
mapper.select: select * from conversation where session_id=#{sessionId} and user_id=#{userId} order by create_time asc
mapper.delete: delete from conversation where session_id=#{sessionId} and user_id=#{userId}
